creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: I forgot to update devel/cmake-doc in the previous patch. For completeness, I'm attaching v2 here and also here: <https://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/cmake-3.5.2-v2.patch>. There's no need to do another exp-run just for this (it's a leaf port and I've tested it locally).
